examples: Her reign was brief but spectacular.
His speech of acceptance was brief but moving.

definitions.text: Occupying a small distance, area or spatial extent; short.
examples: Her skirt was extremely brief but doubtless cool.

definitions.text: A writ summoning one to answer; an official letter or mandate. A short papal letter.
To summarize a recent development to some person with decision-making power.
examples: The U.S. president was briefed on the military coup and its implications on African stability.

definitions.text: To write a legal argument and submit it to a court.
